mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, material_code, material_name, material_spec, unit, material_type, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_material WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, tenant_id, material_code, material_name, material_spec, unit, material_type, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_material WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, material_code, material_name, material_spec, unit, material_type, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM mdm_material WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND material_code = #{materialCode} AND deleted = 0
